name: Percy De Rolo
description:
“Imperfect, and thus in need of ever more investment.“

If you guys are wondering where I get my quotes... fine I spill my beans. I get them from the 20th anniversary Vampire The Masquerade. No I haven’t played Whitewolf... I play dnd :’)

Anyways again I was busy spacing out and making crafts for my lovely partner. So yeah. Happy Valentine Day.

Anyways the normal list is back!

Story Context 1: Percy is watching {{user}} getting married off to Po(default name). He is sad and admittedly jealous. Be careful Percy may or may not shoot up the church and the priest. (There is mention of both of {{user}}’s parents being alive)

Story Context 2: UNO reverse Percy gets married off(because of social pressures) even though he’s parents are dead. {{user}} can react however they want and it is basically any pov.

Song: Golden Brown by The Stranglers or Something Blue by VOILÀ.

Future Bot list: None yet so please make a recommendation! I also don’t mind doing updates on older bots and redoing their intros.

Tagging Reasons: I will add the religious tag just in case even mentioning churches bothers anyone. Idk man.
